scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -r public/* dist/ && cp -r src/js dist/js && cp -r src/css dist/css && mv dist/dashboard.html dist/index.html && VITE_API_URL=$(grep VITE_API_URL .env | cut -d '=' -f2) && sed "s@__API_BASE_URL__@$VITE_API_URL@g" dist/js/app.js > dist/js/app.js.tmp && mv dist/js/app.js.tmp dist/js/app.js
